overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character navigating dark, rainy back alleys at night. The character walks through narrow passages between brick buildings and chain-link fences, eventually approaching a gated barrier. The atmosphere is tense with artificial lighting from street lamps illuminating the wet concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with chain-link fencing and debris

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the alley holding a metal pipe weapon, scanning the surroundings

entered.detail: tall metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the alley
piles of broken concrete and rubble scattered on the ground
weathered red brick wall of adjacent building
single street lamp casting dim light onto the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow urban alleyway at night, flanked by a chain-link fence on the right and brick walls on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the dim artificial lighting from overhead fixtures, creating a tense atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow passage between close brick walls

events.description: character turns left at the corner, moving closer to the brick wall
lighting becomes significantly darker as character enters deeply shadowed passage

agents.ego_description: turning left at the alley corner and proceeding through a darker narrow passage between close walls

entered.detail: exposed metal pipe running horizontally along the wall
window covered with wooden planks on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a left turn into a tighter, darker passage where the lighting drops significantly. The brick walls close in on both sides, with exposed pipes and boarded windows visible as the character moves deeper into the shadowed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening with chain-link fence barrier ahead

events.description: character approaches wooden crate and prepares to climb over it toward the fence gate

agents.ego_description: walking toward a chain-link fence gate and climbing over a wooden crate to approach the barrier

entered.detail: chain-link fence blocking the path with a white tarp hanging on it
rusted metal barrel sitting near the fence line
wooden crate used as a step to climb over the fence barrier
tattered white sheet or tarp hanging on the fence gate

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark passage into a slightly more open area illuminated by street lamps. A chain-link fence gate blocks the path ahead, with a white tarp hanging on it. The character approaches a wooden crate near a metal barrel and begins climbing over it to reach the fence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of oppressive urban corridors that transition from a dim alleyway into a claustrophobic passage before opening into a gated dead end. It begins by following the character through a narrow alley flanked by a chain-link fence and brick walls, where wet asphalt reflects the dim glow of overhead fixtures. As the character makes a left turn, the environment shifts into a tighter, darker corridor where the brick walls close in and exposed pipes emerge from the shadows. The scene then opens into a slightly wider area illuminated by street lamps, revealing a chain-link fence gate draped with a white tarp. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they approach a wooden crate and metal barrel, climbing upward to reach the barrier.
